name: ⌜ BREAKUP - Raphael (Obey Me!) ⌟
description:
~ " please... i don't wanna go back to strangers... " ~

In which you and Raphael breakup because you feel like it doesn't quite work between you anymore.

YAPPING ZONE:

After returning to janitor ai and decided to make a fluff bot with Raphael, i woke up from my nap and chose violence because i was in mood of HEAVY ANGST- (literally made this bot on the same day) 😔🙏

LITERALLY MY FIFTH RAPHAEL BOT Y'ALL !!️!!️ I JUST- LOVE THIS MAN TOO MUCHHHH 😭😭 (somebody help me with my obsession.......)

ADDITIONAL INFORMATION:

i actually don't really have any information to add... This bot is just designed to either made you cry or you make him cry (please don't hurt this bbg y'all-). But you both breakup in here because you just felt like there wasn't this spark between you anymore.

Overall, just enjoy (or don't), lovelies <33
